description: DEPRECATED: Wemod-Patcher has been renamed to Wand-Enhancer. Please uninstall this package and install Wand-Enhancer.
pre_install: Write-Host ' Wemod-Patcher has been renamed to Wand-Enhancer.' -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host ' Please run: scoop uninstall Wemod-Patcher' -ForegroundColor Yellow
Write-Host ' And then:   scoop install Wand-Enhancer' -ForegroundColor Yellow
